title: Improved Weather
description: This datapack improves weather and adds new weather conditions, like a sandstorm and other things!
body:
RESOURCEPACK IS OPTIONAL!
===
(For better rain and snow)
---
Main Information
===
* Creator and Developer: [​MC Silver]
* Minecraft Versions: 1.19.4+
* WIKI Version: 26.2v1
* For datapack developers: My datapack ignores all mobs that use data! (1.21.5+) \
  For custom mobs, use data; for non-custom mobs, use tags/scores!
* WARNING! (for PaperMC and PurpurMC Hosters): \
This datapack will only work correctly if you only change the below settings. \
Head over to your server, and go to "config/paper-world-defaults.yml" or "purpur.yml" file. \
Find this "allow-non-player-entities-on-scoreboards" and set that to true

Commands
=== 
All commands available to the player start with /function .
---
Menu
---
- /function .menu:mcs_weather

Summon
---
- /function .summon:mcs_weather/"entity_name"

Uninstall
---
- /function .uninstall:mcs_weather

Features
===
Snow Biomes
-----
* Snow layer gets higher during the snow.
* Snow increases faster during the thunder.
* Snow melts during clear weather if the light level is higher than 11.
* Snow melts 9 times faster in dry biomes.
* Snow melts 5 times slower in snowy biomes and remains at layer 1.
* Farmland converts into a dirt during the snow, if it contacts with snow.
* Lava cools down during snow.
* Player/Mob take freezing damage during the snowstorm. You won't take damage in areas which light is higher than 11 or if you wear leather chestplate.

Desert Biomes
-----
* Sandstorm. (Rain)
* Strong Sandstorm + Sand Tornado. (Thunder)

[Breezes, Rabbits, Camels, Parcheds and Camel Husks and entities in leather helmet are immune to sandstorm effects]

Jungle, Beach, Lush and Dripstone Caves, River, Ocean, Swamp Biomes
-----
* Mist (Clear, at morning)
* Waves (Clear, ocean only)
* Flood (Rain)
* Massive Flood (Thunder)

Savanna & Badlands Biomes
-----
* Fire, Common Lightnings (On shovel and hoe mineable blocks) (Rain, Daytime only)
* Massive Fire, Common Lightnings (On shovel and hoe mineable blocks) (Thunder, Daytime only)

Fireflies
-----
* Fireflies spawn near rivers and in swamps during clear weather at night.

Campfires
-----
* Campfire is extinguished when it rains.
* Soul Campfire is extinguished twice much rarer than regular campfire when it rains.

Better Rain and Snow [RP]
-----
* Rain: reduced rain particles, more transparent and whitish color [[Image]](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/2GqOYTAx/images/a8428ff53993d9a46e1970efbdb0507e233aa440.png)
* Snow: more transparent
